info.title: Slots API
info.description:
Slots RGS (Remote Game Server) API.

**Auth flow (two-token pattern):**
1. `POST /api/v1/auth/register` or `/login` — returns a 15-min **access token** in the body; sets a 7-day **refresh token** in an `httpOnly` cookie
2. Copy `access_token` → click **Authorize** → paste → game endpoints unlock
3. When the access token expires, `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh` silently issues a new pair (token rotation)
4. `POST /api/v1/auth/logout` revokes all refresh tokens and clears the cookie

access_token.description: RS256 JWT — paste into the Authorize dialog above

expires_in.description: Access token TTL in seconds (15 min)

jobId.description: Job identifier, null for cache hits

error.description: Error detail when failed, null otherwise

post.description:
Creates an account and issues a token pair:
- **Body**: 15-min RS256 access token — copy and paste into **Authorize**
- **Cookie** (`httpOnly`): 7-day refresh token — stored by the browser, never readable by JS
Verifies credentials and issues a fresh token pair. Same response shape as register.

Reads the `refresh_token` httpOnly cookie, validates it, and issues a new token pair (**token rotation** — the old refresh token is invalidated on use). Returns 401 if the cookie is missing or expired. In the browser this happens automatically; the cookie is never visible to JS.

200.description: New access token issued, new refresh cookie set

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired refresh token

post.summary: Logout and revoke all refresh tokens
post.description: Revokes the current refresh token **and all other active sessions** for the user, then clears the cookie. Safe to call even if the cookie is already gone.

get.description: Lightweight check that the process is alive. Does not verify dependencies.
Verifies that the service and its dependencies (database) are ready to accept traffic. Returns 503 when any check fails.

409.description: Idempotency key reused with different payload

get.summary: Get spin history with filters and summary
Get aggregated stats for the current user
Get round detail with provably fair data and transactions

post.summary: Rotate seed pair — reveals old server seed, creates new pair

put.summary: Set the client seed for the active seed pair

get.summary: Get the current active seed pair info

post.description: Add funds to the authenticated user wallet. For demo/testing purposes.

Returns immediately with a job reference.

- **200** — image already cached (filesystem or completed job)
- **202** — job accepted; poll `GET /images/jobs/{jobId}` for the result
- **429** — daily per-user quota exceeded

post.summary: Place roulette bets and spin the wheel

post.description: Creates a new American roulette session (38-number wheel with 0 and 00). Returns the session ID, game config, balance, and recent winning numbers.

post.summary: Place American roulette bets and spin the wheel
post.description: Accepts an array of bets and resolves them against a provably fair spin. The American wheel has 38 pockets (0, 00, 1-36) with a 5.26% house edge.
Accept a rewind offer and execute 5 boosted spins. Only available for game_id: slot_time_rewind_001.

403.description: Forbidden — wrong game or unauthorized session

get.description: Returns the current state of a previously submitted image generation job. When `status` is `completed`, `imageUrl` contains the path to the generated thumbnail.
